issues.description: Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and PlayFromHand action is not supported by official card text. Card text only describes '[On Play] Draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.' No additional effect exists.
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is correct (legacy alias), but verify this matches the official card effect text exactly. Card says 'trash 1 card from your hand' which is accurate.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.
